transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sunrise Recovery Center, Shannon speaking.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, I'm David. I'm looking into treatment for alcohol. My doctor suggested I call.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, sure. How much are you drinking?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: A lot. Pretty much every night. A six-pack or more.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Every night. Okay. Do you have insurance?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes, Summit Select.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Do you have your member ID?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes, it's BP73195529.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: And the group number?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I don't have that with me right now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's okay. We'll try to look it up. Anything else about your situation I should know?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I mean, it's been going on for a few years. I tried to cut back on my own but it didn't really work.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. Any prior treatment programs?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: No, nothing formal.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. And are you looking to come in soon or still deciding?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I think I want to do it but I'm nervous about it. I have kids, so I'm wondering how that works.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We can work around schedules. Our outpatient programs allow people to be home in the evenings.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: That's good to know. I'm worried about the cost too.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your insurance should cover most of it. We'll verify.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. So what do I do now?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We'll have someone call you to set something up.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: When?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Within the next day or two.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Okay. Is there anything I need to have ready?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just your insurance card.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Alright. Thanks.

gold_labels.coaching_notes: BORDERLINE: Urgency triage and next-step clarity are borderline 2-3 — graders may disagree. No compliance violation. Major coaching gaps: no warm empathy opening, clinical screen minimal (missed withdrawal history, severity, duration), group number not escalated as important, objection about kids handled with a single sentence and dropped, cost concern dismissed with 'should cover most of it'. Next step is vague but timing is given.
